_meta.description: Accounting interpretation policy with accrual/cash handling, classification logic, and deterministic validation rules.

definition.en: Recognize income/expenses when earned/incurred, not when cash moves.
definition.pt: Recognize income/expenses when earned/incurred, not when cash moves.

definition.en: Estimate expected credit losses on receivables.
definition.pt: Estimate expected credit losses on receivables.

definition.en: Systematic allocation of intangible asset cost over useful life.
definition.pt: Systematic allocation of intangible asset cost over useful life.

definition.en: Capitalize borrowing costs directly attributable to qualifying assets.
definition.pt: Capitalize borrowing costs directly attributable to qualifying assets.

definition.en: Decide whether spend creates future benefit or period cost.
definition.pt: Decide whether spend creates future benefit or period cost.

definition.en: Recognize income/expenses when cash is received/paid.
definition.pt: Recognize income/expenses when cash is received/paid.

definition.en: Classify assets/liabilities by operating cycle or 12-month horizon.
definition.pt: Classify assets/liabilities by operating cycle or 12-month horizon.

definition.en: Apply accounting methods consistently across comparable periods.
definition.pt: Apply accounting methods consistently across comparable periods.

definition.en: Combine parent and controlled entities removing intercompany effects.
definition.pt: Combine parent and controlled entities removing intercompany effects.

definition.en: Possible asset from uncertain future events; disclose cautiously.
definition.pt: Possible asset from uncertain future events; disclose cautiously.

definition.en: Possible obligation depending on uncertain future events.
definition.pt: Possible obligation depending on uncertain future events.

definition.en: Define which costs belong in COGS versus operating expenses.
definition.pt: Define which costs belong in COGS versus operating expenses.

definition.en: Record transactions in the correct accounting period.
definition.pt: Record transactions in the correct accounting period.

definition.en: Cash received before revenue is earned.
definition.pt: Cash received before revenue is earned.

definition.en: Future tax effects from temporary differences.
definition.pt: Future tax effects from temporary differences.

definition.en: Systematic allocation of depreciable asset cost over useful life.
definition.pt: Systematic allocation of depreciable asset cost over useful life.

definition.en: Ensure notes disclose assumptions, judgments, and uncertainties.
definition.pt: Ensure notes disclose assumptions, judgments, and uncertainties.

definition.en: Assess sustainability and cash conversion of earnings.
definition.pt: Assess sustainability and cash conversion of earnings.

definition.en: Classify unusual/infrequent items according to framework constraints.
definition.pt: Classify unusual/infrequent items according to framework constraints.

definition.en: Measurement based on orderly transaction exit price.
definition.pt: Measurement based on orderly transaction exit price.

definition.en: Translate balances using functional/reporting currency policy.
definition.pt: Translate balances using functional/reporting currency policy.

definition.en: Assume entity continues operating unless evidence says otherwise.
definition.pt: Assume entity continues operating unless evidence says otherwise.

definition.en: Test goodwill for impairment at least annually.
definition.pt: Test goodwill for impairment at least annually.

definition.en: Recognize grants by matching to related costs/conditions.
definition.pt: Recognize grants by matching to related costs/conditions.

definition.en: Apply hedge relationships with effectiveness documentation.
definition.pt: Apply hedge relationships with effectiveness documentation.

definition.en: Assets/liabilities recognized initially at transaction cost when applicable.
definition.pt: Assets/liabilities recognized initially at transaction cost when applicable.

definition.en: Recognize losses when carrying amount exceeds recoverable amount.
definition.pt: Recognize losses when carrying amount exceeds recoverable amount.

definition.en: Recognize identifiable non-monetary assets without physical substance.
definition.pt: Recognize identifiable non-monetary assets without physical substance.

definition.en: Remove intra-group balances and transactions.
definition.pt: Remove intra-group balances and transactions.

definition.en: Inventory measurement under approved valuation method.
definition.pt: Inventory measurement under approved valuation method.

definition.en: Recognition of right-of-use asset and lease liability.
definition.pt: Recognition of right-of-use asset and lease liability.

definition.en: Match expenses to the revenues they help generate.
definition.pt: Match expenses to the revenues they help generate.

definition.en: Items are material if omission/misstatement can influence decisions.
definition.pt: Items are material if omission/misstatement can influence decisions.

definition.en: Item not expected to repeat as ordinary operations.
definition.pt: Item not expected to repeat as ordinary operations.

definition.en: Liability of uncertain timing or amount with probable outflow.
definition.pt: Liability of uncertain timing or amount with probable outflow.

definition.en: Avoid overstating assets/revenue or understating liabilities/expenses.
definition.pt: Avoid overstating assets/revenue or understating liabilities/expenses.

definition.en: Transactions with related parties require explicit disclosure.
definition.pt: Transactions with related parties require explicit disclosure.

definition.en: Expense research, capitalize development when criteria met.
definition.pt: Expense research, capitalize development when criteria met.

definition.en: Track legal/statutory and discretionary reserves with clear movements.
definition.pt: Track legal/statutory and discretionary reserves with clear movements.

definition.en: Correct prior-period errors with retrospective adjustment when required.
definition.pt: Correct prior-period errors with retrospective adjustment when required.

definition.en: Recognize revenue when performance obligations are satisfied.
definition.pt: Recognize revenue when performance obligations are satisfied.

definition.en: Disclose financial information by operating segment.
definition.pt: Disclose financial information by operating segment.

definition.en: Assess events after reporting date for adjustment/disclosure.
definition.pt: Assess events after reporting date for adjustment/disclosure.

definition.en: Accounting reflects economic reality over legal form.
definition.pt: Accounting reflects economic reality over legal form.

definition.en: Reconcile effective tax rate against statutory rate.
definition.pt: Reconcile effective tax rate against statutory rate.

pt: reconciliação da taxa efetiva de imposto

definition.en: Obligation to deliver goods/services for received consideration.
definition.pt: Obligation to deliver goods/services for received consideration.

definition.en: Tax benefit recoverable in future periods from deductible temporary differences or carryforwards.
definition.pt: Benefício fiscal recuperável em períodos futuros decorrente de diferenças temporárias dedutíveis ou prejuízos a compensar.

definition.en: Tax obligation arising from taxable temporary differences payable in future periods.
definition.pt: Obrigação fiscal decorrente de diferenças temporárias tributáveis a pagar em períodos futuros.

definition.en: Accumulated tax losses available to offset future taxable income subject to expiry and limitation rules.
definition.pt: Prejuízos fiscais acumulados disponíveis para compensar lucro tributável futuro, sujeitos a regras de prescrição e limitação.

definition.en: Lease recognized on-balance-sheet as right-of-use asset and lease liability under IFRS 16, formerly off-balance-sheet.
definition.pt: Arrendamento reconhecido no balanço como ativo de direito de uso e passivo de arrendamento conforme IFRS 16, anteriormente fora do balanço.

definition.en: Lease that transfers substantially all risks and rewards of ownership to the lessee.
definition.pt: Arrendamento que transfere substancialmente todos os riscos e benefícios da propriedade ao arrendatário.

definition.en: Asset representing lessee right to use underlying asset for the lease term.
definition.pt: Ativo representando o direito do arrendatário de usar o ativo subjacente durante o prazo do arrendamento.

definition.en: Obligation to make lease payments measured at present value of future payments.
definition.pt: Obrigação de efetuar pagamentos de arrendamento mensurada ao valor presente dos pagamentos futuros.

definition.en: Compensation arrangement where entity grants equity instruments or cash settled based on share price.
definition.pt: Acordo de remuneração em que a entidade concede instrumentos de patrimônio ou liquidação em caixa com base no preço da ação.

definition.en: Right granted to employees to purchase shares at a predetermined exercise price over a vesting period.
definition.pt: Direito concedido a funcionários de adquirir ações a um preço de exercício predeterminado ao longo de um período de aquisição.

definition.en: Shares promised to employees subject to vesting conditions, settled in equity or cash.
definition.pt: Ações prometidas a funcionários sujeitas a condições de aquisição, liquidadas em patrimônio ou caixa.

definition.en: Entity own shares reacquired and held, reducing total equity.
definition.pt: Ações próprias readquiridas e mantidas pela entidade, reduzindo o patrimônio líquido total.

definition.en: Total change in equity from non-owner sources including net income and other comprehensive income.
definition.pt: Variação total do patrimônio líquido de fontes não proprietárias, incluindo lucro líquido e outros resultados abrangentes.

definition.en: Income and expenses not recognized in profit or loss as required by IFRS/GAAP standards.
definition.pt: Receitas e despesas não reconhecidas no resultado do período conforme exigido pelas normas IFRS/GAAP.

definition.en: OCI component arising from translating foreign subsidiary financial statements into reporting currency.
definition.pt: Componente de OCI decorrente da conversão de demonstrações financeiras de subsidiárias estrangeiras para a moeda de apresentação.

definition.en: Equity reserve accumulating effective portion of gains and losses on hedging instruments.
definition.pt: Reserva de patrimônio acumulando a parcela efetiva de ganhos e perdas em instrumentos de hedge.

definition.en: Hedge of exposure to variability in cash flows attributable to a recognized asset/liability or forecast transaction.
definition.pt: Hedge da exposição à variabilidade nos fluxos de caixa atribuível a um ativo/passivo reconhecido ou transação prevista.

definition.en: Hedge of exposure to changes in fair value of a recognized asset/liability or firm commitment.
definition.pt: Hedge da exposição a mudanças no valor justo de um ativo/passivo reconhecido ou compromisso firme.

definition.en: Fair value measured using quoted prices in active markets for identical assets or liabilities.
definition.pt: Valor justo mensurado com base em preços cotados em mercados ativos para ativos ou passivos idênticos.

definition.en: Fair value measured using observable inputs other than quoted prices for identical assets, including similar assets or yield curves.
definition.pt: Valor justo mensurado com base em dados observáveis além de preços cotados para ativos idênticos, incluindo ativos similares ou curvas de juros.

definition.en: Fair value measured using unobservable inputs reflecting entity own assumptions about market participant pricing.
definition.pt: Valor justo mensurado com base em dados não observáveis que refletem as premissas da própria entidade sobre precificação de participantes do mercado.

definition.en: Living animals or plants managed for agricultural activity measured at fair value less costs to sell.
definition.pt: Animais ou plantas vivos gerenciados para atividade agrícola mensurados ao valor justo menos custos de venda.

definition.en: Property held to earn rentals or capital appreciation rather than for use in production or administration.
definition.pt: Propriedade mantida para auferir aluguéis ou valorização de capital, e não para uso em produção ou administração.

definition.en: Non-current asset classified as held for sale when carrying amount will be recovered through sale rather than use.
definition.pt: Ativo não circulante classificado como mantido para venda quando o valor contábil será recuperado por meio de venda e não pelo uso.

definition.en: Component of entity disposed of or classified as held for sale representing a separate major line of business.
definition.pt: Componente da entidade alienado ou classificado como mantido para venda que representa uma linha de negócio principal separada.

definition.en: Disaggregated financial information by operating segment based on internal management reporting.
definition.pt: Informação financeira desagregada por segmento operacional com base em relatórios gerenciais internos.

definition.en: Adjustments to remove intra-group revenues, expenses, receivables, payables, and unrealized profits.
definition.pt: Ajustes para eliminar receitas, despesas, contas a receber, contas a pagar e lucros não realizados intragrupo.

definition.en: Adjusting entries required to produce consolidated financial statements from individual entity statements.
definition.pt: Lançamentos de ajuste necessários para produzir demonstrações financeiras consolidadas a partir de demonstrações individuais.

definition.en: Equity in a subsidiary not attributable directly or indirectly to the parent entity.
definition.pt: Patrimônio em uma subsidiária não atribuível direta ou indiretamente à entidade controladora.

definition.en: Investment in associate or joint venture recognized initially at cost and adjusted for post-acquisition share of profit.
definition.pt: Investimento em coligada ou empreendimento conjunto reconhecido inicialmente ao custo e ajustado pela participação pós-aquisição no resultado.

pt: investimento pelo método de equivalência patrimonial

definition.en: Process of allocating acquisition cost to identifiable assets acquired, liabilities assumed, and goodwill.
definition.pt: Processo de alocação do custo de aquisição a ativos identificáveis adquiridos, passivos assumidos e ágio.

definition.en: Additional consideration in a business combination contingent on future events or performance targets.
definition.pt: Contraprestação adicional em uma combinação de negócios contingente a eventos futuros ou metas de desempenho.

definition.en: Financial liability representing future payments to sellers contingent on acquired business performance.
definition.pt: Passivo financeiro representando pagamentos futuros a vendedores contingentes ao desempenho do negócio adquirido.

definition.en: Provision for costs of a program planned and controlled by management that materially changes scope or manner of business.
definition.pt: Provisão para custos de um programa planejado e controlado pela administração que altera materialmente o escopo ou forma de condução do negócio.

definition.en: Provision recognized when unavoidable costs of meeting contract obligations exceed expected economic benefits.
definition.pt: Provisão reconhecida quando os custos inevitáveis de cumprir as obrigações contratuais excedem os benefícios econômicos esperados.

definition.en: Obligation arising from environmental remediation, decommissioning, or asset retirement activities.
definition.pt: Obrigação decorrente de remediação ambiental, descomissionamento ou atividades de desativação de ativos.

definition.en: Provision for estimated costs of fulfilling warranty obligations on products sold.
definition.pt: Provisão para custos estimados de cumprimento de obrigações de garantia sobre produtos vendidos.

definition.en: Provision for costs associated with recalling defective products from the market.
definition.pt: Provisão para custos associados ao recall de produtos defeituosos do mercado.

definition.en: Impairment model based on forward-looking expected credit losses rather than incurred losses.
definition.pt: Modelo de provisão baseado em perdas de crédito esperadas prospectivas em vez de perdas incorridas.

definition.en: ECL approach for trade receivables using lifetime expected losses without tracking credit deterioration stages.
definition.pt: Abordagem simplificada de ECL para contas a receber comerciais usando perdas esperadas vitalícias sem rastrear estágios de deterioração de crédito.

definition.en: ECL approach requiring three-stage credit deterioration model with 12-month and lifetime loss measurement.
definition.pt: Abordagem geral de ECL exigindo modelo de deterioração de crédito em três estágios com mensuração de perda de 12 meses e vitalícia.

questionTemplate.pt: Quais períodos são afetados pela reapresentação?

questionTemplate.pt: Devo montar uma ponte da taxa nominal para efetiva antes de concluir?

questionTemplate.en: Should I classify this lease under IFRS 16 or US GAAP ASC 842?
questionTemplate.pt: Devo classificar este arrendamento conforme IFRS 16 ou US GAAP ASC 842?

questionTemplate.en: Should I use the incremental borrowing rate or the implicit rate in the lease for discounting?
questionTemplate.pt: Devo usar a taxa incremental de empréstimo ou a taxa implícita no arrendamento para desconto?

questionTemplate.pt: Qual modelo de precificação de opções devo usar: Black-Scholes ou simulação de Monte Carlo?

questionTemplate.pt: Devo aplicar aquisição linear ou gradual para o reconhecimento da despesa de opções de ações?

questionTemplate.pt: Este item de OCI deve ser classificado como reclassificável ou não reclassificável para o resultado?

questionTemplate.en: What is the functional currency of this entity for translation purposes?
questionTemplate.pt: Qual é a moeda funcional desta entidade para fins de conversão?

questionTemplate.en: Which hedge effectiveness testing method was used (dollar-offset, regression, or critical terms match)?
questionTemplate.pt: Qual método de teste de efetividade do hedge foi utilizado (dollar-offset, regressão ou correspondência de termos críticos)?

questionTemplate.en: At which fair value hierarchy level (1, 2, or 3) is this measurement classified?
questionTemplate.pt: Em qual nível da hierarquia de valor justo (1, 2 ou 3) esta mensuração está classificada?

questionTemplate.en: What is the date of classification as discontinued operations?
questionTemplate.pt: Qual é a data de classificação como operações descontinuadas?

questionTemplate.en: Have all intercompany balances been eliminated bidirectionally (both seller and buyer sides)?
questionTemplate.pt: Todos os saldos intercompany foram eliminados bidirecionalmente (lado do vendedor e do comprador)?

questionTemplate.en: Should NCI be measured at acquisition-date fair value (full goodwill) or proportionate share of net assets?
questionTemplate.pt: O NCI deve ser mensurado ao valor justo na data de aquisição (goodwill total) ou pela participação proporcional nos ativos líquidos?

questionTemplate.en: Which valuation methodology was used for each identified intangible (MEEM, relief-from-royalty, with/without)?
questionTemplate.pt: Qual metodologia de avaliação foi usada para cada intangível identificado (MEEM, alívio de royalty, com/sem)?

questionTemplate.en: Has the contingent consideration been remeasured at fair value as of this reporting date?
questionTemplate.pt: A contraprestação contingente foi remensurada ao valor justo nesta data de reporte?

questionTemplate.en: Is there a detailed restructuring plan with evidence of communication to affected parties?
questionTemplate.pt: Existe um plano detalhado de reestruturação com evidência de comunicação às partes afetadas?

questionTemplate.en: Are the expected credit losses measured on a 12-month or lifetime basis, and what stage applies?
questionTemplate.pt: As perdas de crédito esperadas são mensuradas em base de 12 meses ou vitalícia, e qual estágio se aplica?

questionTemplate.en: Which specific ASC 842 criteria were applied to distinguish operating from finance lease?
questionTemplate.pt: Quais critérios específicos do ASC 842 foram aplicados para distinguir arrendamento operacional de financeiro?

en: fair value less costs to sell
pt: valor justo menos custos de venda

questionTemplate.en: What market data source was used for the biological asset fair value less costs to sell?
questionTemplate.pt: Qual fonte de dados de mercado foi usada para o valor justo menos custos de venda do ativo biológico?

questionTemplate.en: Is the investment property measured using the cost model or the fair value model, and is it consistently applied?
questionTemplate.pt: A propriedade para investimento é mensurada pelo modelo de custo ou de valor justo, e é aplicado de forma consistente?

questionTemplate.en: Is there evidence that the asset is available for immediate sale in its present condition?
questionTemplate.pt: Há evidência de que o ativo está disponível para venda imediata em suas condições atuais?

questionTemplate.en: Has the going concern assessment covered at least 12 months from the date of financial statement issuance?
questionTemplate.pt: A avaliação de continuidade operacional cobriu pelo menos 12 meses a partir da data de emissão das demonstrações financeiras?

questionTemplate.en: Do the reported segments meet the quantitative thresholds (10% revenue, profit, or assets test)?
questionTemplate.pt: Os segmentos reportados atendem aos limites quantitativos (teste de 10% de receita, resultado ou ativos)?

questionTemplate.en: Is treasury stock accounted for using the cost method or the par value method?
questionTemplate.pt: As ações em tesouraria são contabilizadas pelo método do custo ou pelo método do valor nominal?

questionTemplate.en: Is comprehensive income presented in a single continuous statement or in two separate statements?
questionTemplate.pt: O resultado abrangente é apresentado em uma demonstração contínua única ou em duas demonstrações separadas?

questionTemplate.en: Have the earn-out scenarios been probability-weighted with disclosed assumptions?
questionTemplate.pt: Os cenários de earn-out foram ponderados por probabilidade com premissas divulgadas?

questionTemplate.en: What discount rate and expected settlement timing were used for the environmental liability?
questionTemplate.pt: Qual taxa de desconto e prazo esperado de liquidação foram usados para o passivo ambiental?
